utterance:
{
  "utterance": "Our project, 'VocalEcho', is a platform that amplifies underrepresented voices in local communities, fostering dialogue and understanding. By leveraging AI, we ensure every voice is heard and valued, driving real social change.",
  "title": "VocalEcho",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "VocalEcho uniquely combines AI with community engagement to ensure underrepresented voices are amplified and heard, addressing the critical need for inclusive dialogue and social change.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Introducing 'EchoWave' — the ultimate social impact platform that amplifies underrepresented voices worldwide, turning every post into a global movement.",
  "title": "EchoWave",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "EchoWave leverages AI to identify and amplify underrepresented voices, ensuring marginalized communities have a stronger presence online. It uses advanced natural language processing to analyze content and promote posts that highlight diverse perspectives.",
  "your_role": "presenter"
}

{
  "utterance": "We're building a platform that uses AI to connect homeless individuals with available resources in real-time, ensuring they never fall through the cracks again.",
  "title": "ResourceConnect",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "ResourceConnect leverages AI to provide personalized, real-time assistance, addressing the inefficiencies and gaps in current social service systems.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "In a world where information is censored and freedom of speech is suppressed, 'Echoes of Dissent' will be a platform that amplifies silenced voices, turning every post into a digital protest against censorship.",
  "title": "Echoes of Dissent",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "This platform uniquely combines social impact with a powerful political message, ensuring that every user's voice is heard and every post becomes a form of resistance.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}
